data.name: 巨乳騎士團長是我的肉便器
data.detailed_description:
■NTR寧死不從的巨乳騎士團長，讓其成為玩物！
剛毅，堅強的巨乳騎士團長上司。第一次交到了年輕小男友的大奶玩物體型的處女小穴被我破處，比起小兒科的憐愛，我選擇用舒服的性交來掠奪她！就算很強，有喜歡的人，也還是敵不過我的雞雞！母狗本能暴露無遺，成為了我專用的玩物！

■充滿NTR場景！
為了守護戀人而獻上自己的處女，戀人就在旁邊卻還偷摸口交，隔著門和戀人對話的同時被操，在和戀人一起待過的房間被開發後庭，丟下戀人被中出，使用認知魔法，在戀人面前的變態露出，穿著下流的情趣內衣，隔著門對話的同時無套深入，NTR宣言&放棄做騎士的魔法放松等等大量NTR場景！用雞雞和精子將本是他人所有的爆乳騎士變成自己的東西！

■大量女性調情狀態！
很不情願，雖然肉體淪陷了，但心理還想著自己的戀人。雖然這種狀態下的中出做愛很多，但在讓其淪陷後還是可以玩到一開始不情願時的體位！有著想看女人滿臉發情地崇拜雞雞狀態的玩家也能滿足的超多內容。

■也有很多懷孕做愛場景！
你可以欣賞到一個不情願放棄自己身體的剛強騎士被NTR的語音，以及一個完全沈迷於雞雞的色情語音！所有語音沒有屏蔽!

■發情聲全語音！
你可以享受到對宅男溫柔，嚴厲的辣妹們沈迷雞雞，發出母狗叫般的色情全語音！淫語和調情的臺詞，高潮臺詞，懷孕臺詞等等等等，盡情享受所有的語音吧！

data.short_description: 寧死不從的巨乳騎士團長，讓她成為我的玩物！ 比起小兒科的憐愛，我選擇用舒服的性交來掠奪她！母狗本能暴露無遺，成為了我專用的玩物！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文

最低配備:

  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c

  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Virgin Knight is my Onahole Tonight
data.detailed_description:
You're the #2 Knight in the Royal Army, not by any particular merit or outstanding feat, but simply because you were born into the Royal Family. Your commander, however, is the opposite. She trained hard to get where she is and her skill with the sword and rippling muscles are testament to that fact.

While out on a mission you take the blame for a lower ranked knight's mistake saving her from being executed! Don't get it twisted, this wasn't out of the goodness of your heart or anything like that. The lower ranked knight who you are covering for just so happens to be Commander Hilda's girlfriend!

The deal is simple, Hilda becomes your on-call sex-toy for the next two months and you're even. Show her what she has been missing out on by plunging her into the rapturous depths of masochistic ecstasy. Have her kneel before you and beg for your cock and she'll be hooked on your cream long before the proposed two-month time limit is up! And so, the games begin.


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Hilda is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • A Scene Studio to view all the beautifully drawn sprites and backgrounds
  • 17 sadistic scenarios to push Hilda to her masochistic limit.

Virgin Knight is my Onahole Tonight Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Blackmail your caked-up commander into becoming your personal sex-toy for two months. If she isn't hopelessly addicted to you by then, she is welcome to go back to her little girlfriend.
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
